finding: C. LYMPH neoplasm, congenital, cardiothoracic surgery, obstruction of hilum / SVC

differentials.name: FIBRIN = exudate (a)  infection: viral, pyogenic, tuberculous (b)  renal insufficiency: 18% in acute uremia; 51% in chronic uremia; dialysis patient (c)  collagen vascular disease: SLE, rheumatoid arthritis, acute rheumatic fever (d)  hypersensitivity: Dressler syndrome
differentials.raw: FIBRIN = exudate (a)  infection: viral, pyogenic, tuberculous (b)  renal insufficiency: 18% in acute uremia; 51% in chronic uremia; dialysis patient (c)  collagen vascular disease: SLE, rheumatoid arthritis, acute rheumatic fever (d)  hypersensitivity: Dressler syndrome

differentials.name: chest pain, dyspnea, cyanosis, hypotension, tachycardia
differentials.raw: chest pain, dyspnea, cyanosis, hypotension, tachycardia

context: CXR: √  normal with fluid < 250 mL / in acute pericarditis √  "water bottle configuration" = symmetrically enlarged cardiac silhouette √  loss of retrosternal clear space √  "fat-pad" sign = separation of retrosternal from epicardial fat line > 2 mm (in 15%) by water density √  rapidly appearing cardiomegaly + normal pulmonary vascularity √  "differential density" sign = increase in lucency at heart margin ← slight difference in contrast between pericardial fluid + heart muscle √  diminished cardiac pulsations CT: √  effusion of greater than water density = hemopericardium, malignancy, purulen
